05 = Chairfast, unable to ambulate and is unable to wheel self.
06 = Bedfast, unable to ambulate or be up in a chair. CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1870_CU_FEEDING M1870 (M0710) Current Feeding This field indicates the patient's current ability to feed self meals and snacks safely. 00 = Able to independently feed self.
01 = Able to feed self independently but requires: (a) meal set-up; OR (b) intermittent assistance or supervision
